General.Name: Delivery Hero SE
General.Description: Delivery Hero SE provides online food ordering, quick commerce, and delivery services. The company also offers advertising services. It operates in approximately 70 countries across Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe, and Latin America. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Berlin, Germany.
